commands.review_summary:
The PR enriches pi-embedded overload, rate-limit, and transport error text with provider/model/profile/trigger/session/request context and threads profile/trigger through runner payload formatting.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review blockers: source inspection of the PR head shows req= extraction and narrowed api_error detection, while current main shows request_id suppression and broad transient matching. I did not run a live provider/channel scenario, and the PR does not provide one.
